title: Street Fighter 6/Version/1.04 - SuperCombo Wiki
content_text: Version 1.04 Game Version 1.04 date February 27, 2024 Summary Ed Release. Several balance changes and bug fixes. Links Patch Notes Ed Patch Ed released Universal Changes Drive Rush Simultaneous activation no longer randomly gives the frame advantage to one player Perfect Parry Fixed issue where a Perfect Parry could occur when absorbing a hit on the 3rd startup frame Armor Break Fixed issue where Armor Break would not occur properly if the defender was in armor hitstop from another attack Input Buffers Fixed issue where input buffer after blocking an attack was not set correctly for Drive Reversal and some other attacks Modern Controls Fixed issue where S button would not result in damage scaling if a special was input during a Drive Rush screen freeze Character Changes A.K.I. 2LP Range increased 0.94 → 0.96 5MP Active frames increased 3 → 5 (better meaty setups, stronger in neutral) Chun-Li 5LP Hurtbox expanded downward on startup (more easily counterpoked by low-angled attacks) Aerial Lightning Kicks (j.236K) 20% Starter scaling added (less rewarding on Punish Counter when used against throws) Dee Jay Funky Slicer (214K~LK) Less pushback on block Larger hurtbox during recovery (easier to pressure Dee Jay or whiff punish) Dhalsim HP Yoga Flame (63214HP) Fixed issue where 2nd hit dealt normal damage on Counter-hit/Punish Counter Jamie Forward Throw (LPLK) Can now hold LP+LK to gain 1 Drink Level (prevents throw loop, but Jamie is still KD +7) SA1 (236236K) Damage increased by 100 on both the regular version and Drink ender Reduced pushback on Hit in the corner KD Advantage increased by 5 frames (allows Jamie to use Drink ender while maintaining oki) SA2 (214214P) After the install timer ends, Jamie retains his previous Drink Level (no longer resets to DL0) JP 5HP Expanded foot/torso hurtbox during active and recovery frames 2HP Arm hurtbox is no longer anti-air invincible (more susceptible to trading on late anti-air attempts) Departure (214P/PP) 20% Starter scaling added Increased opponent's Drive gauge recovery on Parry: 5000 → 7500 (regular) / 2500x2 → 3500x2 (OD) Amnesia (22K/KK), successful counter JP no longer builds Super meter while bombs are active or until combo ends Bombs no longer dissipate Super-priority projectiles Starter scaling (when Bomb starts the combo) increased 15% → 50% Immediate scaling (when comboing into Bomb) increased 15% → 60% Canceling an attack into SA3/CA now detonates the Bombs immediately to prevent bypassing this damage scaling Ken Forward Throw (LPLK) More pushback against cornered opponents (can still walk for a throw loop with ~3f timing window) 5LP Hurtbox expanded downward on startup (more easily counterpoked by low-angled attacks) OD Air Tatsu (j.214KK) Landing recovery on whiff increased 14 → 21 (harder to escape the corner) Collision box expanded so opponents are less likely to jump over this move Luke 2MP Whiff recovery increased 14 → 17 with a larger hurtbox Aerial Flash Knuckle (j.214P) When performed near the jump apex, has a shorter trajectory and landing recovery on whiff increased 13 → 20 Larger feet hurtbox on frame 16 until end of recovery SA1 (236236P) Wider projectile-vulnerable hurtbox on startup frames 1-5 Manon En Haut 1 (4MK) Retains greater momentum out of Drive Rush SA2 (214214K) Juggles more consistently; if opponent drops out, their knockdown period is extended (less likely for Manon to be punished) Rashid 5LP Hurtbox expanded downward on startup (more easily counterpoked by low-angled attacks) OD Spinning Mixer (236PP) Now has 5 frames of Anti-Air Invuln (9-13f) after Full Invuln frames run out Wall Jump Fixed issue where performing certain moves would not put Rashid into a Forced Knockdown state Ryu Solar Plexus Strike (6HP) Proximity guard hitbox now reaches the full length of the move's range on frame 2 (much harder for the opponent to walk out of pressure) Hadoken (236P) Reduced the extended arm hurtbox (harder to jump over, counter-poke, or punish with invincible attacks) OD Shoryuken (623PP) First hit now knocks down to prevent Ryu from being punished when the 2nd hit whiffs LP Hashogeki (214LP) Block Advantage -4 → -3 with reduced pushback on block Increased pushback on block vs. Burnout MP Hashogeki (214MP) Expanded the attack and projectile clash hitbox forward HP Hashogeki (214HP) Reduced pushback on block Expanded the attack and projectile clash hitbox forward OD Hashogeki (214PP) Reduced pushback on hit/block Expanded the attack and projectile clash hitbox forward Denjin Hashogeki (Denjin 214P/PP) Reduced pushback on block Expanded the attack and projectile clash hitbox forward Denjin OD version damage increased 600 → 1000 SA1 (236236P) Reduced the extended arm hurtbox (harder to jump over or punish with invincible attacks, and more effective against other projectiles) Zangief OD Double Lariat (PPP) 1st hit combos into SA3/CA when canceled (causes a brief crumple state on grounded opponents) Faster horizontal movement on startup 2nd hit connects vs. grounded opponents 1f earlier (for combo consistency) 1st hit reduced knockback distance vs. airborne opponents SA1 (236236K) Hitbox extended downward (can juggle and anti-air more consistently)

items.text: Amnesia (22K/KK), successful counter JP no longer builds Super meter while bombs are active or until combo ends Bombs no longer dissipate Super-priority projectiles Starter scaling (when Bomb starts the combo) increased 15% → 50% Immediate scaling (when comboing into Bomb) increased 15% → 60% Canceling an attack into SA3/CA now detonates the Bombs immediately to prevent bypassing this damage scaling
items.html:
Amnesia (22K/KK), successful counter
  • JP no longer builds Super meter while bombs are active or until combo ends
  • Bombs no longer dissipate Super-priority projectiles
  • Starter scaling (when Bomb starts the combo) increased 15% → 50%
  • Immediate scaling (when comboing into Bomb) increased 15% → 60%
  • Canceling an attack into SA3/CA now detonates the Bombs immediately to prevent bypassing this damage scaling

lists.text: OD Double Lariat (PPP) 1st hit combos into SA3/CA when canceled (causes a brief crumple state on grounded opponents) Faster horizontal movement on startup 2nd hit connects vs. grounded opponents 1f earlier (for combo consistency) 1st hit reduced knockback distance vs. airborne opponents SA1 (236236K) Hitbox extended downward (can juggle and anti-air more consistently)

items.text: OD Double Lariat (PPP) 1st hit combos into SA3/CA when canceled (causes a brief crumple state on grounded opponents) Faster horizontal movement on startup 2nd hit connects vs. grounded opponents 1f earlier (for combo consistency) 1st hit reduced knockback distance vs. airborne opponents
items.html:
OD Double Lariat (PPP)
  • 1st hit combos into SA3/CA when canceled (causes a brief crumple state on grounded opponents)
  • Faster horizontal movement on startup
  • 2nd hit connects vs. grounded opponents 1f earlier (for combo consistency)
  • 1st hit reduced knockback distance vs. airborne opponents

items.text: SA1 (236236K) Hitbox extended downward (can juggle and anti-air more consistently)
